## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content production priorities and strategy for Smith and Exec.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Smith Priority:** Immediately publish 7 pending articles (4 from last week, 3 new) to catch up on the publishing schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [**Exec Strategy:** Refocus content on "business corporate" topics (e.g., roleplay, sales scenarios) to correct for ranking on the wrong user intent.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [**Microcopy Mandate:** Create a separate microcopy document for Smith pillar pages (leads, image descriptions, glossary) to unblock implementation by Marty.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [**Project Management:** The team is migrating from Linear to Notion for recurring tasks, a temporary step before the final move to Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

## Topics

### Smith Content Production

  - [**Problem:** The publishing schedule is behind.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [**Action:** Publish 7 pending articles immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
      - [4 from last week](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
      - [3 new](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [**Distribution:** Post published articles to Facebook and LinkedIn.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [**Goal:** Publish as many topics as possible before Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Smith Microcopy & Page Structure

  - [**Mandate:** Create a separate microcopy document for Smith pillar pages to unblock implementation by Marty.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [**Required Elements:**](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**Lead Snippet:** A short, distinct third snippet at the article's start.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**Image Descriptions:** Alt-text for any illustrations or screenshots.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
      - [**Glossary of Terms:** A list of key terms for the page.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [**CMS Limitation:** Industry pages are limited to 6 modules.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
      - [**Action:** Usman will remove the extra module from the "Accounting and Bookkeeping" draft to resolve the staging issue.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)

### Exec Content Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Reroute content to target the correct user intent.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
  - [**New Topics:**](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
      - [**Business Roleplay:** Focus on "business corporate" keywords to avoid ranking for the wrong intent.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
      - [**Sales Scenarios:** Cover the full funnel (scripts, cold calling) with practical examples.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
      - [**Sales Methodologies:** Cover SPIN, practices, and ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [**Refreshes:**](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [**Leadership Approaches:** Add one more topic.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
      - [**Duplicate Check:** Usman must verify no duplicates exist before writing.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)

### Project Management & Admin

  - [**Process Change:** The team is migrating recurring tasks from Linear to Notion, a temporary step before moving to the final Atlas system.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [**Availability:**](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
      - [Usman: Available during "balcony days" (uses them for focused work).](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
      - [Jo: OOO for two weeks in February.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Usman:**](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
      - [Publish 7 pending Smith articles today.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
      - [Create and send the Smith microcopy document to Jo.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
      - [Remove the extra module from the "Accounting and Bookkeeping" draft.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [Begin writing new Exec content and performing refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
      - [Add more topics to the Smith content queue.](https://fathom.video/share/CTKFzXrLvXLvqcXAfL6n1tpvNXB2gtXV?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
